ch: 我是撒奇萊雅族的小孩。

ab: lalima ku tademaw nu luma’ niyam.
en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: mapulung kaku aci ama, ina, kakama, kakana mueneng.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: talakaw ci ama aku, u kingcal ci ama aku.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: makudus ci ina aku, u misaydan ci ina aku.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: i luma’ hanu u kamu nu Sakizaya masasukamu ci ama i tamiyanan.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Sakizaya language with us at home.

ab: yu pihibangan nu lalud taluma’ namin kami i niyazu’.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: maladay kaku aci kakama, kakana tayza mizakep tu balaut.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: manamuh kaku tu lalabu nu luma’ a tademaw niyam.
en: I like our family very much.
